note: CNAP is used only as offline training/evaluation labels. Runtime app uses these fixed coefficients and does not read CNAP values.

SinBP_D.architecture: RTBP base with M2 A/HR/relTTP features plus residual [intercept, Stiffness_sin, E]

RTBP.note: Experimental smartphone-only baseline adaptation. Runtime inputs are the first 30 good beats' smartphone features plus beat-local deltas; CNAP is used only as offline training/evaluation labels. Do not ship without LOSO validation.

experimental_smartphone_rich_dynamic_ble.note: Smartphone-only best-of-both candidate: absolute MAP/PP baseline comes from experimental_smartphone_rich_baseline, while short-term dynamics are the refit_map_pp_smoothed model delta from the first good beats. CNAP is only used offline to fit the fixed baseline and dynamic coefficients.
